_instructions: To ingest content for a site: (1) Add sitemap/RSS URLs above, (2) Drop files in its knowledge/ subdirectory, (3) Add its domain to EIGEN_FETCH_ALLOWLIST in Supabase Edge Function secrets, (4) Run the ingestion workflow.
